name: Floyd Public Company Limited
summary: Floyd Public Company Limited engages in the installation of utility and fire suppression systems in Thailand. It offers services in the areas of mains distribution, UPS, generators, general lighting and power, architectural lighting, HVAC, BMS, plumbing, gas systems, fire alarms, data and telecoms, MATV and CCTV, access control, and security systems. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Nonthaburi, Thailand.
